:::: {.columns .home-columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}

**I'm an Associate Professor at MAP5, Université Paris Cité.**

My research interests revolve around **inverse problems**, **control** and **optimisation**.

[Publications](publications.qmd) ·
[Enseignement](enseignement.qmd) ·
[CV](cv.qmd) ·
[Contact](contact.qmd)

:::

::: {.column width="35%"}

![](assets/photo.jpg){width=200px}

:::

::::
